contact.tagline: Available for focused collaborations and high-quality digital work.

cards.title: Who I Am
cards.text: I'm Wiktor, an 18-year-old graphic designer, developer, and content creator. I started Nozercode about 3 years ago with simple graphics in Photopea and websites built with HTML and CSS. Since then, I have been improving every year.

cards.title: My Mission
cards.text: I challenge myself every day to learn something new and build projects I can be proud of. My goal is to create practical, creative work that helps me grow and delivers real value for clients.

cards.title: Roblox Development
cards.text: Alongside coding and design, I build Roblox games and models. I run my own group where I publish and sell projects created by me and my team.

finalCard.title: Always Learning, Always Growing
finalCard.text: My journey is still in progress. I keep learning new technologies, improving my workflow, and taking projects that raise my level.

about.randomFactPlaceholder: Click shuffle to reveal a fact about me.

randomFacts.text: In 2025, I won the biggest graphic design contest at my local school, earning prizes worth over USD 1,000.
I have already traveled to more than eight countries.
I have two pets: a cockatiel parrot and a crested gecko.
I reached Rysy peak in Slovakia and also climbed other mountain peaks in Poland and Slovakia.
I participated in the Erasmus+ project in Malaga, Spain.
I can move my left ear and crack three fingers on my hands.
I love playing Roblox, especially meeting new people on voice chat.

favorites.subtitle: Get to know me
favorites.intro: A quick look at what I enjoy most.
